GAMMA_WALL_EXPLANATION: Gamma walls are strike prices with high open interest where dealers hedge continuously. For ABNB, put wall at $115 (OI=342) creates buying support, call wall at $140 (OI=220) creates selling resistance. Our iron condor profits from price staying within this range.

MACRO_BOX_2_TEXT: Jet fuel prices up 95% since Iran conflict escalation. Airlines raising bag fees. Consumer confidence under pressure. Deloitte warns post-pandemic travel momentum could slow as financial caution reaches high-spending groups.
MACRO_BOX_3_TEXT: ABNB down 4.8% over 30 days. Travel sector caught between resilient demand and valuation concerns. Corporate travel budgets rising 5% provides floor. Premium selling environment as stock consolidates in $120-$140 range.
